Get to know me

About Me

∞
Always Learning

Hey there! I'm Ankit Pandey, a passionate developer and engineering student from India with a love for creating meaningful digital experiences. I believe that great software isn't just functional — it's beautiful, intuitive, and impactful.

My journey in tech started with curiosity and has grown into a deep commitment to web development and problem-solving. Whether it's crafting a pixel-perfect UI or debugging a tricky algorithm, I'm always up for the challenge.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to projects, or enjoying the great outdoors. I'm driven by the belief that technology can transform lives — and I want to be part of that transformation.

🌐 Web Development ⚡ Technology 🧩 Problem Solving 🚀 Open Source 📱 Mobile Dev

What I've built

Featured Projects

A selection of things I've built while exploring the web and beyond.

🛒
REACT · NODE.JS

ShopEase — E-Commerce

A full-featured e-commerce platform with product filtering, cart management, and a seamless checkout experience built with React and Node.js.

GitHub Live Demo
📋
JAVASCRIPT · CSS

TaskFlow — Task Manager

A productivity app with drag-and-drop task boards, priority labels, and local storage persistence. Clean UI built in vanilla JavaScript.

GitHub Live Demo
🌤️
API · JAVASCRIPT

WeatherNow — Weather App

Real-time weather application using the OpenWeatherMap API with location detection, 5-day forecasts, and beautiful animated weather icons.

GitHub Live Demo
